hero.description: CANLAH AI builds intelligent agents that automate marketing, sales, service, and commerce — so your team focuses on what matters.

products.title: One Platform, {highlight}
products.subtitle: Each agent is purpose-built for its domain — and all share the same underlying AI platform.

cards.name: CanMarket
cards.description: Brand-consistent content at scale. Style Genome™ remembers your brand so every image looks like you — not a generic AI output.

cards.name: CanService
cards.description: 24/7 intelligent support across every channel. Resolve tickets faster with AI that understands context and escalates intelligently.

cards.name: CanSales
cards.description: From lead to close, automated. AI-powered pipeline management that follows up, qualifies, and converts while you sleep.

cards.name: CanCommerce
cards.description: Optimize every listing, ad, and conversion funnel. E-commerce intelligence that drives revenue 24 hours a day.

platform.title: Built on a {highlight}
platform.subtitle: All four agents run on the same infrastructure — share data, share memory, share brand identity.

capabilities.label: Agent Orchestration
capabilities.desc: Multi-step reasoning across agents with automated decision routing

capabilities.label: Multi-Model Routing
capabilities.desc: Best model for each task — GPT, Gemini, Claude — intelligently selected

capabilities.label: Workflow Automation
capabilities.desc: Visual workflow builder with trigger-action pipelines and connectors

capabilities.label: Knowledge & Data Layer
capabilities.desc: 768-dim brand memory vectors with retrieval-augmented generation

capabilities.label: Enterprise Security
capabilities.desc: SOC 2 compliant, data isolation, SSO, and audit logs

capabilities.label: Multi-Language Support
capabilities.desc: Native EN / ZH / ZH-TW with locale-aware content generation

studio.name: Agent Studio
studio.tag: Custom AI agents for enterprises with unique requirements
studio.note: Powered by the CANLAH platform — no outsourcing
studio.headline: Build any agent your business needs
studio.body: Don't fit a standard product? Agent Studio lets enterprises configure bespoke AI agents on the same platform infrastructure — with full brand memory, model routing, and integration capabilities.

features.title: Industry Templates
features.desc: Pre-built for retail, F&B, finance, healthcare

features.title: Visual Workflow Builder
features.desc: No-code agent configuration with drag & drop

features.title: Prompt Orchestration
features.desc: Multi-step chains with memory and context

features.title: Knowledge Ingestion
features.desc: Feed docs, URLs, and databases to your agent

features.title: API Connectors
features.desc: Connect to any CRM, ERP, or custom system

features.title: Enterprise Deployment
features.desc: On-prem, private cloud, or managed SaaS

footer.tagline: AI Agents for Every Business Function
